case_title: GRANITE CREDITORS SERVICE INC. VS. NIZAR FAKHOURI ET AL

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANITE CREDITORS SERVICE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FAKHOURI, NIZAR FAKHOURI, RANA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-15-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-16-2018

MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2018 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAR-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 220, JUDGE KATHLEEN A KELLY. PATRICK TALBOT HALL, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT NIZAR FAKHOURI APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. TIME ESTIMATE: 3 HOURS. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
EXHIBIT LIST FOR PLAINTIFF FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 62202188) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANITE CREDITORS SERVICE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FAKHOURI, NIZAR FAKHOURI, RANA
ORDER TO RETURN OR DESTROY EXHIBITS AND/OR DEPOSITIONS
MINUTES FOR MAR-12-2018 10:30 AM
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANITE CREDITORS SERVICE INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY FIRST-CLASS MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 17303039) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANITE CREDITORS SERVICE INC.

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAR-12-2018 IN DEPT. 220 - THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF, JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT 6635.00 WITH 10% INTEREST. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COST TO BE DETERMINED, MR. HALL SHALL SUBMIT PROPOSED JUDGMENT TO MR. FAKHOURI BY WEDNESDAY, MARCH 14, 2018. MR. HALL IS TO ALSO SUBMIT SAID JUDGEMENT TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: KATHLEEN KELLY; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (D220).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRANITE CREDITORS SERVICE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAKHOURI, NIZAR FAKHOURI, RANA $6,635.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,359.00 INTEREST, $487.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,681.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
PROOF OF SERVICE BY FIRST-CLASS MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 17303039) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANITE CREDITORS SERVICE INC.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAR-12-2018 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-15-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
